title: Artificial Intelligence Risk Management Framework (AI RMF 1.0) — NIST AI 100-1
jurisdiction: United States (Federal — National Institute of Standards and Technology)

extraction_boundaries.notes: Full text ingested from user-supplied DOCX. Original PDF was unextractable; user provided DOCX as replacement. Content includes Executive Summary, Part 1, Part 2 (Govern/Map/Measure/Manage functions with subcategory tables), and Appendices A-D.

provenance_notes: Extraction used python-docx with lxml namespace-aware heading detection (w:pStyle). Heading levels (Heading1 → #, Heading2 → ##) and table structure (pipe tables) were normalised; all text content is verbatim from the DOCX. The user-supplied DOCX accuracy against the authoritative PDF at doi.org/10.6028/NIST.AI.100-1 was not independently verified. SHA256 is of the extracted markdown.
